mapper.select: SELECT day, page_type AS pageType, SUM(cnt) AS cnt FROM t_page_view_stat WHERE day >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY day, page_type ORDER BY day ASC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt), 0) AS totalPv FROM t_page_view_stat WHERE day >= #{startDay}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt), 0) AS totalPv FROM t_page_view_stat WHERE day >= #{startDay} AND day < #{endDay}
